name: ai-atomic-framework
description: Governance framework for AI-assisted atomic engineering work.

scripts.test: node scripts/validate-product-charter.mjs --mode test && node scripts/validate-package-skeleton.mjs --mode test && node scripts/validate-schemas.mjs --mode test && node scripts/validate-cli.mjs --mode test && node scripts/validate-local-git-adapter.mjs --mode test && node scripts/validate-language-js.mjs --mode test && node scripts/validate-examples.mjs --mode test && node scripts/validate-bootstrap.mjs --mode test

scripts.lint: node scripts/validate-product-charter.mjs --mode lint && node scripts/validate-package-skeleton.mjs --mode lint && node scripts/validate-schemas.mjs --mode lint && node scripts/validate-cli.mjs --mode lint && node scripts/validate-local-git-adapter.mjs --mode lint && node scripts/validate-language-js.mjs --mode lint && node scripts/validate-examples.mjs --mode lint && node scripts/validate-bootstrap.mjs --mode lint
